params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: ChatGLM Phase 4 deep inspect — React state machine think→text transition diagnosis. PRIOR ITER 7/8 stuck at think_only. Investigate via DevTools React tab: (1) Identify React state values for chat-bubble state machine during think phase. (2) Document state transitions expected for think→text per HAR (compare to current stuck state). (3) Check React Query / fetcher state for any pending text request. (4) Console: try manually dispatch a text-state-completion event to see if text bubble mounts (rule out engine emission issue). (5) Network: inspect SSE chunks (data: events) received during the test — confirm engine emits both think:init + think:finished + text:finished frames at the EXACT format. Save React state snapshots + network frame samples to results/files/{id}/.
